api.name: AECS RFQ Engine API
api.principle: RFQ is not a contact form. It is a structured engineering project definition system.

submit.description: Submit an architectural project for engineering evaluation

constraints.attachments: optional but recommended for engineering validation

classification_engine.purpose: Convert user input into engineering system category
classification_engine.logic: Based on geometry, load, complexity, and architectural constraints

principles: RFQ must behave like a system input engine
Every submission becomes a structured engineering object
User input is transformed into engineering classification
